title: AttentionDecisionV2
description: I-010B AttentionDecisionV2@1 — the tagged host-facing decision union. status 'ok' carries one of exactly four permitted classifier/effective pairs (SUPPRESS->SUPPRESS, SUPPRESS->DEFER, WAKE->WAKE, DEFER->DEFER) with the closed routing audit (applied valve, override cause, margin status, effective margin exactly when the margin applied, trusted margin source only on a margin-applied decision), the sibling ok-branch 'reasons' audit field, evidence IDs, classifier audit, the optional legacy verdict-confidence vector — required exactly when the classifier disposition is SUPPRESS while the routing audit reports the margin active (FR-007) — and WAKE-only grounded advice (FR-013); status 'bypass' carries exactly cause 'preattention-disabled' and excludes the full FR-005 set (classifier/effective disposition, classifier audit, reasons, evidence, legacy confidence vector, routing audit, advice); status 'error' remains operational and separate. Advice citations against the request's event IDs are a runtime-adapter-only rule (FR-013).

confidence.$comment: Finite [0,1]. The contradictory-bounds not-clause rejects NaN, which vacuously satisfies every numeric comparison keyword; strict JSON cannot carry non-finite literals, but sentinel-decoded corpus instances can.

evidence_event_ids.$comment: Every citation must reference an event ID supplied in the request; that cross-document rule is runtime-adapter-only (FR-012/FR-013).

routing.$comment: The closed FR-005 routing audit with its per-combination rules: a margin counts as applied exactly on valve margin-defer — the effective margin is then required and is forbidden on every other valve, override cause must be margin, and the margin status must be active (a retired margin cannot apply); the trusted margin source may appear only on that margin-applied decision (optional there); valves none and classifier-defer pair with override cause none; valve policy-defer pairs with override cause suppression-disabled or recoverability-unproven.

effective_margin.$comment: Finite (0, 1]; the contradictory-bounds not-clause rejects NaN exactly as $defs/confidence does.

reasons.$comment: A required sibling ok-branch audit field — never a member of the routing-audit object — retained as audit material that never enters the participant turn.

legacy_confidence.$comment: FR-007: optional on status ok and required exactly when the classifier disposition is SUPPRESS while the routing audit reports the margin active; a well-formed vector may accompany WAKE, DEFER, or a margin-retired SUPPRESS without invalidating them. When present: exactly the four legacy verdict keys with finite values in [0,1]. The optional field, its exact shape, and the conditional requirement are fixed for @1; removing or reshaping the field is a breaking @2 edit.

allOf.$comment: FR-007 conditional requirement: a margin-active candidate SUPPRESS must carry the legacy vector.

oneOf.$comment: WAKE->WAKE: valve none (no widening valve applied); the only pair that may carry advice (FR-013).
DEFER->DEFER: the classifier-defer valve, distinct from margin-defer (S08).
SUPPRESS->DEFER: widened by the margin or policy valve; the exact valve, override cause, and margin facts follow the routing cross-field rules.
SUPPRESS->SUPPRESS: governed suppression with no widening valve applied (S05).

bypass.$comment: A non-social no-classifier outcome excluding the full FR-005 set: no classifier/effective disposition, classifier audit, reasons, evidence, legacy confidence vector, routing audit, or advice. Not a successful disposition pairing; it must not fabricate a model judgment.

error.$comment: The tagged operational branch: malformed output, illegal pairings, and invalid legacy confidence land here and cannot fabricate a social suppression.
